event.title: PyCon US 2026
event.metaDesc: It's time to celebrate Python and the Pythonistas that help build our OSS ecosystem ❤️ Come check out our booth to learn about all of the exciting OSS projec...
event.content: It's time to celebrate Python and the Pythonistas that help build our OSS ecosystem ❤️  Come check out our booth to learn about all of the exciting OSS projects, tools, and platforms we are building for maintainers and help us celebrate maintainer month!
